name: Gem-Elephant
desc: During your Main Phase: You can return this face-up card on the field to the hand. Once per battle, during damage calculation, if this card battles (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Normal Monster from your hand to the GY; this card gains 1000 DEF during that damage calculation only.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can return this face-up card on the field to the hand. Once per battle, during damage calculation, if this card battles (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Normal Monster from your hand to the GY; this card gains 1000 DEF during that damage calculation only.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can return this face-up card on the field to the hand. Once per battle, during damage calculation, if this card battles (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Normal Monster from your hand to the GY; this card gains 1000 DEF during that damage calculation only.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from field to hand
